name: SYNTH-V | Yi Xi (Butcher Vanity)
description:
TW!: Cannibalism, Gore.

“Oh, hey roomie.”

Figured I’d make something a bit spookier for October, cause y’know, Halloween and stuff. Also, you guys ever listen to Orchestraful’s (Artful mastery) chase theme? It’s SO good. I don’t know why I never see any talk about it. It’s always “Arena of Death V1” this (despite V2 being arguably better, but yall ain’t ready for that conversation) and “F3X Abuser” that, but never “hey, I really like Orchestraful’s theme”. Sorry for the tangent, I just really like the DOD OST.

I headcanon that Yi Xi is more reserved rather than crazy and also kinda desensitised to killing and views it and the consumption of human meet as nothing crazy. Art by mizu kuni123 on Rule 34 (I’m not kidding). Also I made her 6 foot 7 (haha 67 67)

Enjoy my brobots <3
creator: GockGobbler
